summary: Full player journey traced: IntroCeltOS → Menu3DPC → HubAntre → BroceliandeForest3D ↔ HubAntre (active path). 2 CRITICAL fixes applied, 3 HIGH open, 3 MEDIUM open, 4 PASS.

checks.detail: project.godot: run/main_scene=IntroCeltOS.tscn. File exists. IntroCeltOS.gd:516 → Menu3DPC.tscn via PixelTransition.

menu_3d_pc.gd:1326 _glitch_transition('res://scenes/HubAntre.tscn'). Expected flow was Menu→Quiz→Rencontre→Hub, but director cancelled quiz (q-20260414-005). Current direct-to-Hub routing is acceptable post-deletion of orphan scenes, but no first-run check exists.

IntroPersonalityQuiz.tscn + SceneRencontreMerlin.tscn still exist on disk. Not reachable from Menu3DPC. Director q-20260414-005 ordered deletion. Task E2E-DELETE-ORPHAN-SCENES P3 exists but still pending.

FIXED: broceliande_forest_3d.gd:1222 was routing to MerlinGame.tscn when _merlin_found=true. Removed GAME_SCENE const, updated _on_hub() to always route to HUB_SCENE (HubAntre.tscn). MerlinGame.tscn is no longer a navigation target from the forest.

game_flow_controller.gd class_name GameFlowController. NOT an autoload. NEVER instantiated in any active scene. Run3D.tscn is a bare stub (only script node, no UI/3D tree). GameFlowController references HubScreen.tscn (not HubAntre). This entire architecture (Run3D + GameFlowController + HubScreen + EndRunScreen) is unreachable. Director q-20260414-004 ordered migration. Task E2E-DEAD-PATH-GAME-FLOW-CONTROLLER P4 exists.

EndRunScreen.tscn exists. ui_overlay_endscreen.gd has btn_hub → HubAntre and btn_new → BroceliandeForest3D. BUT EndRunScreen is only wired in GameFlowController which is dead. Active path has no end-run screen shown to player after forest walk completes. Player goes directly back to HubAntre with no summary.

FIXED: ui_overlay_narrative.gd:289,291 was routing to MenuPrincipal.tscn instead of Menu3DPC.tscn. MenuPrincipal.tscn exists but is a legacy/alternate scene not in the main flow. Fixed to Menu3DPC.tscn.

map_ui.gd:495 → TransitionBiome.tscn → BroceliandeForest3D. MapMonde.tscn exists but HubAntre SCENE_MAPMONDE const defined but no hotspot routes to it (only TRANSITION routes are Calendar/Options/Arbre/Collection). MapMonde unreachable from main flow.

broceliande_forest_3d.gd:6 declares signal merlin_encounter_complete, emitted at :964. Signal updated comment to remove MerlinGame reference. Signal is not connected to any autoload/controller — was intended for GameFlowController (dead). Low player impact now but needed when GameFlowController is wired.

All main scene transitions use PixelTransition.transition_to() with fallback get_tree().change_scene_to_file(). PixelTransition is an autoload in project.godot. Pattern consistent across Calendar, Collection, HubAntre, IntroCeltOS, Menu3DPC.
